issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting guidance for troubleshooting.
The file contains extensive explanatory text that could be trimmed for brevity.
The installation instructions use macOS-specific brew commands, restricting compatibility with other platforms.

scenarios.name: porter.yaml for web + worker + cron with autoscaling
scenarios.rationale: Treatment authored a version: v2 porter.yaml declaring web/worker/job service types, autoscaling with targetCPU, a predeploy migrate step, and secret: true env vars, matching the skill's schema; baseline produced raw Kubernetes manifests with no Porter primitives.

scenarios.name: Per-PR preview environments with isolated database
scenarios.rationale: Treatment enabled previews in porter.yaml with addons of type postgresql and per-app predeploy migrate+seed using the documented preview block; baseline manually scripted namespace-per-branch in kubectl with no Porter preview configuration.
